name: story-rail-01
title: Story Rail 01
author: ilinxa
description: Horizontal stories rail (kasder-exact) — gradient ring on unread, muted ring on read; AddStoryThumbnail standalone export + leading slot; Embla used inline (drag-free skim-scroll, no indicator dots); mode-aware edge-fade gradients (framed vs bare); realtime via Subscribe<StoryRailDelta>. Always-uncontrolled with reset() + dispatch() + markViewed() imperative escape hatches. Click does NOT auto-mark-viewed (matches Instagram). Decoupled from the viewer — onItemClick hands off to host. Seventh ship in the social-posts-system arc.
